data.name: ChangeDocumentOnUpdatingLayoutException_Message
data.value: The document was modified while layout was updating. This leaves the layout state invalid. TextEditor={0}

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_FindFirstDirtyParagraph_NoDirtyParagraph
data.value: No paragraph required layout when layout processing started.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_EnsureFinishLayoutCompleted_OutlineSizeMissing
data.value: A paragraph did not update its outline size after layout completed.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_EnsureFinishLayoutCompleted_ParagraphStillDirty
data.value: A paragraph is still dirty after layout completed.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_EnsureFinishLayoutCompleted_StartPointMissing
data.value: A paragraph did not update its layout start point after layout completed.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_EnsureFinishLayoutCompleted_TextSizeMissing
data.value: A paragraph did not update its text size after layout completed.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_PreUpdateDocumentLayout_NextParagraphStartMismatch
data.value: The expected next paragraph start point is {0}, but the actual value is {1}.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_PreUpdateDocumentLayout_StartPointMissing
data.value: Paragraph {0} did not update its layout start point after pre-layout.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_PreUpdateDocumentLayout_TextSizeMissing
data.value: Paragraph {0} did not update its text size after pre-layout.

data.name: ArrangingLayoutProvider_UpdateDocumentLayout_ClearAllCharDataRequiresFullUpdate
data.value: Clearing all character layout info requires a full layout update.

data.name: CharDataLayoutHelper_ClearAllCharDataInfo_ParagraphMustBeDirty
data.value: All character data can be cleared only when the paragraph is dirty.

data.name: CharData_DebugVerify_MismatchedReference
data.value: The render data stored in this CharData belongs to a different CharData instance.

data.name: CharData_GetStartPoint_BeforeAppend
data.value: The start point cannot be read before the character is added to a paragraph.

data.name: CharData_GetStartPoint_BeforeLayout
data.value: The start point cannot be read before layout starts.

data.name: CharData_GetStartPoint_InvalidVersion
data.value: The character data is no longer valid.

data.name: CharData_SetCharDataInfo_DuplicateSet
data.value: {0} cannot be assigned more than once.

data.name: CharData_SetCharDataInfo_InvalidInput
data.value: Invalid character data info is not allowed.

data.name: CharData_SetLayoutCharLineStartPoint_BeforeAppend
data.value: The character start point cannot be set before the character is added to a paragraph.

data.name: CharDataBeAddedToMultiParagraphException_Message
data.value: The CharData was added to multiple paragraphs. CharData={0};OldParagraphIndex={1};NewParagraphIndex={2};TextEditor={3}

data.name: DocumentOffset_Constructor_MinimumValue
data.value: The minimum document offset value cannot be less than the default value -1.

data.name: TextEditorCore_DebugRequireReUpdateAllDocumentLayout_DebugOnly
data.value: {0} can be called only in debug mode.

data.name: TextEditorCore_HorizontalTextAlignment_NotSupported
data.value: Horizontal text alignment is controlled by paragraphs, not by the whole text editor.

data.name: TextEditorCore_LayoutEmptyTextEditor_EmptyOnly
data.value: Empty-text layout can be called only for an empty text editor.

data.name: TextEditorCore_RequireReUpdateAllDocumentWhenFinishWithException_InvalidState
data.value: This method can be called only when the text editor is dirty and the previous layout finished with an exception.

data.name: LineBreakRun_GetChar_NotSupported
data.value: {0} does not expose character objects.

data.name: NumberMarker_GetMarkerText_CustomRequiresOverride
data.value: Override {0} when AutoNumberType is Custom.

data.name: RatioVerticalCharInLineAlignment_Constructor_Range
data.value: The line space ratio must be within the range [0, 1].

data.name: TextLineSpacings_AtLeastLineSpace_NotImplemented
data.value: This feature is not implemented yet.

data.name: TextSpanCharObject_Constructor_SurrogatePairOnly
data.value: Only surrogate-pair characters can use two chars for representation.

data.name: TextSpanCharObject_Constructor_UnsupportedCharCount
data.value: Under the current Unicode definition and within the UTF-32 range, CharCount is normally 1 or 2. A value of {0} is not supported.

data.name: DocumentManager_SetParagraphProperty_ParagraphNotInDocument
data.value: The specified paragraph is not part of the document.

data.name: DocumentManager_SetStyleParagraphProperty_InitializationOnly
data.value: Style paragraph properties can be set only during initialization before any paragraph is created.

data.name: DocumentManager_SetStyleTextRunProperty_InitializationOnly
data.value: Style text run properties can be set only during initialization before any paragraph is created.

data.name: DocumentRunEditProvider_RemoveRange_EmptyParagraphButNotAtEnd
data.value: A paragraph has no removable characters even though the caret is not at the paragraph end.

data.name: DocumentRunEditProvider_RemoveRange_LengthOutOfRange
data.value: Removing text exceeded the number of characters available in the text editor.

data.name: GetCharDataOutOfRangeException_Message
data.value: The requested character offset is out of range. Count={0};InputOffset={1};ParagraphIndex={2};CharDataList={3};TextEditor={4}

data.name: HitCaretOffsetOutOfRangeException_Message
data.value: [HitCaretOffsetOutOfRangeException] ArgumentName={0};DocumentManagerCharCount={1};CaretOffset={2};TextEditor={3}

data.name: HorizontalArrangingLayoutProvider_GetNextParagraphLineStartPoint_OutlineSizeRequired
data.value: Only paragraphs with completed layout can be used to get the next paragraph line start point.

data.name: HorizontalArrangingLayoutProvider_UpdateNotDirtyParagraphStartPoint_ParagraphStillDirty
data.value: The paragraph is dirty while updating a non-dirty paragraph or line.

data.name: HorizontalArrangingLayoutProvider_UpdateParagraphLineLayoutData_CharStartPointMissing
data.value: A character did not receive a layout start point.

data.name: HorizontalArrangingLayoutProvider_UpdateParagraphLineLayoutData_ZeroCharLine
data.value: A layout line consumed zero characters.

data.name: LayoutChecker_EnsureMarker_MarkerCharSizeMissing
data.value: The marker character size was not calculated during layout.

data.name: LayoutChecker_EnsureMarker_MarkerCharStartPointMissing
data.value: The marker character position was not assigned during layout.

data.name: LayoutChecker_EnsureMarker_MarkerCharVersionInvalid
data.value: The cached version for a marker character is invalid.

data.name: LayoutChecker_EnsureMarker_MarkerCharsRequired
data.value: A marker layout must contain marker characters.

data.name: LayoutChecker_EnsureNextStartPoint_GapBetweenParagraphs
data.value: A gap was found between paragraph layouts. ParagraphIndex={0};PreviousStartPoint={1};PreviousOutlineSize={2};CurrentStartPoint={3}

data.name: LayoutHitTestProvider_ParagraphHitTest_ParagraphOffsetMismatch
data.value: The document offset passed to hit testing does not match the paragraph offset. CurrentCharIndex={0};ParagraphStartOffset={1}

data.name: LigatureHelper_CannotFindLigatureStart
data.value: The ligature start character could not be resolved from the provided list.

data.name: NotFoundMatchCharacterFontException_Message
data.value: No font that can render character '{0}' was found. The current device might not have any suitable font installed.

data.name: ParagraphPropertyLayoutUtilsExtension_HorizontalAlignmentNotSupported
data.value: Horizontal text alignment '{0}' is not supported.

data.name: ParagraphData_AppendCharData_AlreadyBelongsToParagraph
data.value: This CharData already belongs to a paragraph and cannot be added again.

data.name: ParagraphData_AppendCharData_LineBreakNotAllowed
data.value: {0} cannot be added to a paragraph.

data.name: ParagraphData_InitVersion_DuplicateInit
data.value: Repeated initialization is not allowed.

data.name: ParagraphData_SplitRemoveByParagraphOffset_OutOfRange
data.value: ParagraphCharCount={0};Offset={1}

data.name: ParagraphData_UpdateVersion_InitRequired
data.value: Call {0} before initialization.

data.name: ParagraphIndex_Constructor_NonNegative
data.value: Paragraph indexes cannot be negative.

data.name: SingleCharImmutableRun_SplitAt_NotSupported
data.value: {0} contains only one character and cannot be split further.

data.name: SingleImmutableRunList_GetRun_IndexMustBeZero
data.value: When getting a run from {0}, the {1} argument must be 0, but the actual value is {2}.

data.name: ReadOnlyRunListExtension_GetRunByCharIndex_OutOfRange
data.value: The maximum character count is {0}; the provided character index is {1}.

data.name: TextRun_GetRun_IndexMustBeZero
data.value: When getting a run from {0}, the {1} argument must be 0, but the actual value is {2}.

data.name: ReadOnlyParagraphList_EnumFailedVersion
data.value: The text changed during enumeration and can no longer be traversed.

data.name: RenderInfoProvider_GetCaretRenderInfo_CannotHitChar
data.value: Failed to resolve the character that corresponds to the caret.

data.name: RenderInfoProvider_GetSelectionBoundsList_EmptySelection
data.value: Selection bounds cannot be calculated for an empty selection.

data.name: SelectionOutOfRangeException_Message
data.value: Selection from {0} to {1} Length={2} DocumentCharCount={3};TextEditor={4}

data.name: TextEditorDebugException_ToString
data.value: Debug-only exception. {0} TextEditor={1}

data.name: TextEditorDirtyException_FinishUpdateLayoutWithExceptionSuffix
data.value: The previous layout pass ended with an exception, so layout might have started but could not complete. TextEditor.{0}=True

data.name: TextEditorDirtyException_Message
data.value: The text editor content changed and layout or rendering has not finished yet, so layout-related data cannot be accessed.

data.name: TextEditorException_ToString
data.value: TextEditor={0} {1}

data.name: TextEditorInnerDebugAsset_AreEquals
data.value: The expected and actual values for {0} do not match. Expected: {1}; Actual: {2}.

data.name: TextEditorMeasurerInvalidCharDataInfoException_Message
data.value: The character still has no size after measurement. Index={0};Character='{1}'

data.name: TextEditorNotInUndoRedoModeException_Message
data.value: A text-editor undo or redo specific method was called while the editor was not in undo or redo mode. TextEditor={0}

data.name: TextEditorParagraphNotFoundException_Message
data.value: The specified paragraph could not be found in the paragraph list because it has already been removed. Deleted paragraphs are not accepted.

data.name: TextEditorRenderInfoDirtyException_Message
data.value: The text layout has been updated and this render info is stale. Do not cache RenderInfoProvider instances. Current update reason: {0} TextEditor={1}

data.name: UpdateLayoutContext_SetCharDataLayoutInfo_OnlyDuringLayout
data.value: Layout properties for {0} can be set only during layout processing.

data.name: ParagraphLayoutIndentInfoExtension_IndentTypeMismatch
data.value: The expected and actual values for IndentType do not match. Expected: {0}; Actual: {1}.

data.name: TextPointInParagraphCoordinateSystem_ContentThicknessRequired
data.value: The paragraph must have valid content thickness before converting paragraph coordinates to document coordinates.

data.name: TextPointInParagraphCoordinateSystem_OtherParagraphNotAllowed
data.value: Coordinates from another paragraph cannot be used for this paragraph.

data.name: TextEditorUndoRedoReentrantException_Message
data.value: A new undo or redo operation was triggered while an undo or redo operation was already in progress.
